title: lindsaea linduensis
intro: Lindsaea linduensis, also known as Lindu tree fern, is a species of fern native to Indonesia. It is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Lindsaeaceae, characterized by its tree-like habit and distinctive fronds. The Lindu tree fern has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts are often used to treat various health issues, including fever reduction, wound healing, and digestive problems, and can be prepared as teas, infusions, or tinctures.
